meal.name: Margherita Pizza
meal.description: A classic pizza with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil on a thin and crispy crust.

meal.name: Mac & Cheese
meal.description: Creamy cheddar cheese mixed with perfectly cooked macaroni, topped with crispy breadcrumbs. A classic comfort food.

meal.name: Caesar Salad
meal.description: Romaine lettuce tossed in Caesar dressing, topped with croutons and parmesan shavings.

meal.name: Falafel Wrap
meal.description: Crispy falafels wrapped in a warm pita with lettuce, tomatoes, and a tahini sauce.

meal.name: Lemon Cheesecake
meal.description: A creamy cheesecake with a tangy lemon flavor, served on a crumbly biscuit base.
